title: Differentiation
summary: 9709 P3 differentiation — chain, product, quotient rules, implicit and parametric differentiation with GeoGebra tangent explorer.
learningObjectives: Differentiate combined functions using chain, product, and quotient rules.

simpleExplanation.title: P3 extends P1 differentiation
simpleExplanation.summary: P3 adds layers: functions of functions, implicit curves, and parametric forms. Related rates link derivatives through a constraint.
steps: Implicit: differentiate both sides w.r.t. x.

sections.content: **Differentiation** on P3 (3.4) goes beyond P1 (1.7). Examiners nest **chain rule** inside **product rule** — work from the **inside out**.
